rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tournament bracket structure with escalating opponent difficulty; comedic claymation character design undercuts tension with absurdist humor

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic opponents with simple attack patterns; mechanical introduction via early tournament matches
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate AI opponents with more frequent special move usage; escalating match complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced opponents with complex move combinations; final tournament rounds before boss
notable_spikes: N. Boss final encounter (described as 'hilariously-rushed' in development notes, suggesting unconventional difficulty spike)
Transition from standard tournament opponents to final boss

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear tournament structure where player progresses through sequential opponent matches; climax features absurdist final boss unrelated to circus theme
Each opponent character parodies fighting game archetypes and pop culture (Hoppy parodies Terminator); comedic presentation balances combat tension

data_quality_notes: T3 Tier - Limited documentation on specific level design sequences, pacing rhythms, and spatial structure patterns. Fighting game paradigm does not emphasize level-based progression; tension/relief derived from match structure rather than environmental design. Character roster and narrative context extracted; mechanical progression patterns inferred from tournament structure.
